complexFurnishingsBeginnerGuide.title: Complex Furnishings Beginner Guide
complexFurnishingsBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic idea of the game, what to do first, and how to understand its strange furniture-store setting.
complexFurnishingsBeginnerGuide.intro: Complex Furnishings is a Roblox co-op experience by Real Mouse Productions. The official description says your furniture store has an infinite stockroom, but the stockroom does not want you taking anything, with the game inspired by The Backrooms film by A24 and Kane Parsons.

steps.title: Open the Official Roblox Page
steps.description: Use the official Roblox experience page for the real play link, creator name, description, store tab, and server tab.

steps.title: Understand the Core Premise
steps.description: You are inside a furniture store with an infinite stockroom. The main hook is exploring a normal-looking retail space that turns into a strange backrooms-style environment.

steps.title: Play With Co-op in Mind
steps.description: The official page marks the game as co-op, so beginners should treat exploration as safer and clearer with other players nearby.

steps.title: Move Slowly Through the Stockroom
steps.description: The description says the stockroom does not want players taking anything, so new players should explore carefully instead of rushing through rooms.

steps.title: Use Official Updates for New Mechanics
steps.description: Follow the Roblox page, Discord invite, and sushiclozy teaser channel for launch updates, code news, and gameplay changes.

complexFurnishingsGameLink.title: Complex Furnishings Game Link and How to Play
complexFurnishingsGameLink.subtitle: Use the official Roblox page to join Complex Furnishings and check its current access state.
complexFurnishingsGameLink.intro: The official Complex Furnishings Roblox page is the main place to play the game. It lists the experience name, creator, description, store tab, server tab, and device support note.

cards.title: Official Roblox Experience
cards.description: This is the official game page for joining, favoriting, checking servers, and reading the game description.

cards.title: Creator
cards.description: The Roblox page lists Real Mouse Productions as the creator of Complex Furnishings.

cards.title: Device Support
cards.description: The official description includes an all-devices note, making the game relevant for desktop and mobile Roblox players.

cards.title: Multiplayer Style
cards.description: The official page describes the experience as co-op, so the intended play style is group exploration rather than only solo play.

cards.title: Stats Tracker
cards.description: Use the RoMonitor experience page to check public Roblox analytics such as performance and activity trends.

complexFurnishingsMapAndRooms.title: Complex Furnishings Map and Rooms Guide
complexFurnishingsMapAndRooms.subtitle: Understand the main setting, room flow, and backrooms-style areas before entering the infinite stockroom.
complexFurnishingsMapAndRooms.intro: Complex Furnishings is built around a furniture store with an infinite stockroom and a backrooms-inspired atmosphere. The map content should be read as liminal-space exploration: normal store areas can lead into strange rooms, stockroom paths, and co-op navigation moments.

items.title: Furniture Store Area
items.content: The starting concept is a furniture store. New players should use this area to understand the visual theme before moving deeper into the stockroom.

items.title: Infinite Stockroom
items.content: The official description says the furniture store has an infinite stockroom. Treat this as the core exploration zone where rooms and paths can feel repetitive, unnatural, or maze-like.

items.title: Backrooms-Inspired Rooms
items.content: The game is inspired by The Backrooms film by A24 and Kane Parsons, so players should expect liminal spaces, empty-room tension, and unusual navigation instead of a normal furniture-shop layout.

items.title: Co-op Movement
items.content: Because the Roblox page describes the game as co-op, players should move together, remember room cues, and avoid splitting too far when exploring unfamiliar sections.

items.title: Navigation Rule
items.content: The stockroom does not want players taking anything, so the safest beginner approach is to explore slowly, watch for layout changes, and use familiar furniture or room shapes as landmarks.

complexFurnishingsMonstersAndSurvival.title: Complex Furnishings Monsters and Survival Guide
complexFurnishingsMonstersAndSurvival.subtitle: Complex Furnishings is built around a furniture store with an infinite stockroom that pushes back when players try to take items. The survival loop focuses on cautious movement, co-op awareness, and avoiding panic during backrooms-style threat moments.
complexFurnishingsMonstersAndSurvival.intro: Use this guide as a practical survival flow for early runs. The game page describes the setting as an infinite furniture stockroom, supports co-op, and frames the stockroom itself as hostile, so the safest approach is to move slowly, stay together, and treat every long hallway or room change as a possible danger point.

steps.title: Enter the Stockroom Carefully
steps.goal: Do not rush into new rooms just because they look empty.
steps.description: Complex Furnishings uses a backrooms-inspired stockroom setting, so repeated rooms, tight turns, and long sightlines are part of the danger. Pause at corners, check paths before moving, and avoid sprinting into unknown spaces.

steps.title: Stay Close in Co-op
steps.goal: Use teammates as extra eyes instead of splitting too early.
steps.description: The official Roblox page lists the game as co-op, which makes group movement important. Keep one player watching forward paths while another watches side angles or the route back.

steps.title: React Fast During Chase Moments
steps.goal: Run toward open paths, not random furniture piles.
steps.description: Public gameplay clips present Complex Furnishings as a Roblox backrooms horror experience. During sudden danger, prioritize clear hallways, wide gaps, and recognizable room markers instead of stopping to inspect objects.

steps.title: Use Furniture as Navigation Clues
steps.goal: Remember room layouts so you can return safely.
steps.description: Because the setting is a furniture store and stockroom, objects can help players mentally mark where they have already been. Use large furniture clusters, unusual props, and room shapes as simple landmarks.

steps.title: Leave Risky Areas Before Panic Builds
steps.description: The core premise says the stockroom does not want players taking anything. Treat deeper exploration as higher risk and back out when paths become confusing or teammates lose track of each other.

complexFurnishingsFurnitureAndItem.title: Complex Furnishings Furniture and Item Guide
complexFurnishingsFurnitureAndItem.subtitle: Furniture is the center of the Complex Furnishings setting: players are inside a store with an infinite stockroom full of objects and room layouts. The best way to read the environment is to treat furniture as both atmosphere and navigation information.
complexFurnishingsFurnitureAndItem.intro: Complex Furnishings does not present a traditional weapon or item list on the public Roblox page. The visible game data points to a furniture-store horror setup, so this module organizes the object types players are most likely to notice while exploring: stockroom furniture, props, room clutter, paths, and visual landmarks.

rows.use: Main environmental focus of the game
rows.tip: Use large furniture pieces as landmarks when moving through repeated rooms.

rows.use: Helps separate one area from another visually
rows.tip: Pay attention to unusual objects because they can help your team remember safe routes.

rows.tip: Avoid getting trapped in cluttered spaces when a chase or sudden threat starts.

rows.tip: Call out recognizable details to teammates so the group can regroup faster.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Complex Furnishings

questions.question: What is Complex Furnishings?
questions.answer: Complex Furnishings is a Roblox backrooms-style horror game by Real Mouse Productions where players explore a furniture store with an infinite stockroom that does not want them taking anything.

questions.question: Is Complex Furnishings free to play on Roblox?
questions.answer: Yes. Complex Furnishings is a Roblox experience, so you can join it through the official Roblox game page with a Roblox account.

questions.question: Does Complex Furnishings have redeem codes?
questions.answer: Complex Furnishings does not currently list any official redeem codes on its Roblox page. Watch the official Discord and the sushiclozy YouTube channel for new code drops.

questions.question: Is Complex Furnishings singleplayer or co-op?
questions.answer: The official Roblox page describes Complex Furnishings as a co-op experience, so group exploration is the intended play style.

questions.question: Where can I follow Complex Furnishings updates?
questions.answer: Follow Complex Furnishings through the official Discord invite, the sushiclozy YouTube channel, and the Roblox game page for launch news and new clips.

questions.question: What devices support Complex Furnishings?
questions.answer: The official Complex Furnishings Roblox listing includes an all-devices note, making it playable across Roblox-supported desktop and mobile devices.
